# 💖 Sponsors

Thank you for considering sponsoring **Legal AI Agent**! Your support helps maintain and improve this open-source legal assistant for Vietnamese businesses.

## 🌟 Current Sponsors

_No sponsors yet — be the first!_

---

## Why Sponsor?

This project provides **free, open-source AI legal assistance** for Vietnamese businesses. Your sponsorship helps:

- 🔧 **Maintain** the project and keep it up-to-date
- 📚 **Expand** the legal document database (currently 40K+ documents)
- 🚀 **Add features** requested by the community
- 🇻🇳 **Support** Vietnamese open-source development
- ⚖️ **Democratize** legal tech access for small businesses


---

## 💰 Sponsor Tiers

### ☕ Coffee Supporter — $5/month
Thank you for your support!
- ✅ Your name listed in this file
- ✅ Sponsor badge on your GitHub profile

### 🥉 Bronze Sponsor — $25/month
- ✅ Everything in Coffee tier
- ✅ Logo in README
- ✅ Priority issue response (24h)

### 🥈 Silver Sponsor — $100/month
- ✅ Everything in Bronze tier
- ✅ Direct support channel (Telegram/Discord)
- ✅ Feature request priority
- ✅ Monthly project updates

### 🥇 Gold Sponsor — $500/month
- ✅ Everything in Silver tier
- ✅ Prominent logo placement in README
- ✅ Custom features (within scope)
- ✅ Quarterly video call with maintainer
- ✅ Early access to new features

### 🏢 Enterprise Sponsor — Contact for pricing
For companies using this in production or requiring:
- 🛠️ Custom development
- 📞 SLA & dedicated support
- 🎯 White-label deployment
- 🔒 Private hosting assistance
- 📊 Custom integrations

**Contact:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Paparusi/legal-ai-agent/issues) or [@gau_trader on Telegram](https://t.me/gau_trader)

## How to Sponsor

1. Visit [github.com/sponsors/Paparusi](https://github.com/sponsors/Paparusi)
2. Choose a tier
3. Complete payment

Your support means the world! 🙏
